config.script:
#include "50518"
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' holder do startowania / zatrzymywania subtrace #comment '-----------------------------------------------------------------------
class cnx_subtrace_holder private bDisposed
private m_oNXSubTrace private m_oSinkStream private m_strFileName
private sub class_initialize() bDisposed = false
set m_oNXSubTrace = nothing set m_oSinkStream = nothing m_strFileName = "" end sub private sub class_terminate() 'TODO manual_done() end sub public sub init(byval strSubTraceName,byref oSink,byval strFileName) set m_oSinkStream = oSink if not oSink is nothing then oSink.seektoend end if m_strFileName = strFileName set m_oNXSubTrace = nx_.trace.start(strSubTraceName,oSink) end sub public property get highest_error_class highest_error_class = nx_.trace.highest_error_class end property public property get name name = m_oNXSubTrace.name end property
public function manual_done() if not bDisposed then bDisposed = true
if not m_oNXSubTrace is nothing then m_oNXSubTrace.stop end if if not m_oSinkStream is nothing and m_strFileName <> "" then m_oSinkStream.save m_strFileName end if set m_oNXSubTrace = nothing
if not m_oSinkStream is nothing then m_oSinkStream.rewind end if
set manual_done = m_oSinkStream set m_oSinkStream = nothing
end if end function
public function done() set done = manual_done() end function
public function get_results_as_page(byval iErrorClass,byref oResultStream) if highest_error_class >= iErrorClass then get_results_as_page = true doc_.parsexml nx_.nxtrace2page(oResultStream,0,0),done() else get_results_as_page = false end if end function
public function get_results_as_txt(byval iErrorClass,byref oResultStream) get_results_as_txt = (highest_error_class >= iErrorClass) doc_.parsexml nx_.nxtrace2page(oResultStream,0,1),done() end function end class
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' nowy sub-trace (bez zapisywania wynikow do pliku) #comment '-----------------------------------------------------------------------
function new_nxsubtrace(byval strSubTraceName,byref oStream) dim oNXSH : set oNXSH = new cnx_subtrace_holder oNXSH.init strSubTraceName,oStream,"" set new_nxsubtrace = oNXSH end function
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' nowy sub-trace (z zapisniem wynikow do pliku) #comment '-----------------------------------------------------------------------
function new_nxsubtrace_file(byval strSubTraceName,byref oSink,byval strFileName) dim oStream
if oSink is nothing then set oStream = doc_.createstreamobj() else set oStream = oSink end if
dim oNXSH : set oNXSH = new cnx_subtrace_holder oNXSH.init strSubTraceName,oStream,strFileName set new_nxsubtrace_file = oNXSH end function
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' wyswietl strone z wynikami, ale tylko gdy sa zdarzenia o klasie iErrorClass lub #comment ' wyzszej #comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------- sub show_log_page(byval iErrorClass,byref oNXSH) if trans_.isvar(COMMON_VAR_UISTYLE) then 'trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "COMMON_VAR_UISTYLE " + cstr(clng(trans_.var(COMMON_VAR_UISTYLE))) if clng(trans_.var(COMMON_VAR_UISTYLE)) <> clng(1) then exit sub end if else 'trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "no COMMON_VAR_UISTYLE " end if
dim oXMLResultStream : set oXMLResultStream = doc_.createstreamobj()
if oNXSH.get_results_as_page(iErrorClass,oXMLResultStream) then dim pPage : set pPage = doc_.getpagehli(asp_form_hli(20219,doc_.createhli(),oXMLResultStream)) pPage.domodalauto()
end if end sub
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' wyslij maila z wynikami, ale tylko gdy sa zdarzenia o klasie iErrorClass lub #comment ' wyzszej #comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------- sub send_mail_raport(byval iErrorClass,byref oNXSH,byval strRecipentAddr) dim oXMLResultStream : set oXMLResultStream = doc_.createstreamobj() dim strTraceName : strTraceName = oNXSH.name if oNXSH.get_results_as_page(iErrorClass,oXMLResultStream) then dim pM60299 : set pM60299 = doc_.getmodule(60299) pM60299.nx_send_mail_internal_1_att strRecipentAddr, _ "Raport wykonania " + strTraceName,"","Raport",oXMLResultStream end if end sub
#comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' zapisz wyniki w logu TXT #comment '----------------------------------------------------------------------- function save_txt_log(iErrorClass,strFileName,byref oNXSH) dim oTXTResultStream : set oTXTResultStream = doc_.createstreamobj() oTXTResultStream.attach strFileName oTXTResultStream.seektoend save_txt_log = oNXSH.get_results_as_txt(iErrorClass,oTXTResultStream) end function
